mnemonics: FLAWED P.I.E. - A flawed pie is unethical to serve. (Fairness, Liability, Accountability, Well-being, Explainability, Privacy, Inclusivity, Equity)
keyPoints: Fairness: Ensuring AI systems do not create or reinforce unfair bias.
Accountability: Establishing clear responsibility for AI outcomes and decisions.
Explainability: The need for AI systems to be transparent and their decisions understandable to humans.
Privacy: Protecting personal data from misuse throughout the AI lifecycle.
Well-being: AI should prioritize and safeguard human safety and mental health.
Inclusivity: Involving diverse stakeholders in AI development and deployment.
Equity: Aiming for AI to promote justice and reduce societal disparities.
commonMistakes: Focusing solely on technical performance metrics (like accuracy) while ignoring ethical implications.
Treating the factors as a checklist rather than interconnected principles that must be balanced.
Assuming a 'one-size-fits-all' solution for ethics across different cultures and applications.
